topic: Cell A cobot recurring C4 communication fault

messages.text: C4 again on the cell A cobot, second time this week
C4 is comms between the control box and the arm. one-off is usually the base-flange cable, but recurring means a flaky cable or connector
reseated the base flange cable last time and it came back
then the cable is intermittent. lock out the cell (SOP-2204), inspect the base-flange connector pins for damage, and schedule a robot cable replacement. clear the stop per SOP-2201 for now
logged a cable replacement, reseated and re-homed to finish the shift
